title: psychotria nervosa var. lanceolata
intro: Psychotria nervosa var. lanceolata, also known as Wild Mountain Pepper, is a variety of the Psychotria nervosa plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and relieve anxiety. The health benefits of Wild Mountain Pepper include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve respiratory function, making it a valuable herb for those suffering from various health conditions. In herbal preparations, Wild Mountain Pepper is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and can also be dried and used as a spice in cooking.
